name: Sauteed Oyster Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently rinse and pat dry the mushrooms. Trim to a uniform size and set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat for 15 to 20 seconds.
3. Add garlic and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
4. Add mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes.
5. Stir in rosemary and margarine (if using) until the margarine is melted, about 30 seconds.
6. Sprinkle flour over the mixture and stir to combine.
7. Gradually add sherry vinegar and tamari, stirring constantly.
8. Cook until the liquid is slightly thickened and mushrooms are tender, about 4 minutes.
